pr.title: deps: bump pydantic 2.13 -> 2.14 (closes #831)
pr.body:
Bumps `pydantic` minor version in `pyproject.toml`. Lockfile regenerated by `uv lock`; no application source touched. Closes #831.

Upstream changelog reviewed: no breaking changes for our schemas (the `BaseModel` API surface we use is unchanged).
pr.author: renovate-bot
